message:
feat(e2e): add manifest generation, golden integrity tests, and VDBE safety fixes

profile_db CLI expansion:
- Add --checksums, --manifest-path, --write-manifest, --manifest-only
  flags for golden fixture manifest generation
- Gate golden directory requirement behind !manifest_only mode

Golden fixture integrity:
- Add manifest_path() and metadata_path() helpers to golden_integrity
- New test manifest_v1_matches_checksums_and_metadata validating
  manifest.v1.json consistency with checksums and per-DB metadata
- Add manifest_v1.rs test module (new file)

Type coercion fix (fsqlite-types):
- Reject NaN/Infinity early in try_coerce_text_to_numeric with
  explicit return None before the finite-check block
- Add #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)] and
  #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] on f↔i64 casts

VDBE engine safety (fsqlite-vdbe):
- sql_div: use checked_div to handle i64::MIN / -1 overflow,
  promoting to float on overflow instead of panicking
- sql_rem: use checked_rem to handle i64::MIN % -1 overflow,
  returning Integer(0) per SQLite semantics
- char_to_affinity: correct mapping to match SQLite's actual
  encoding (A=Blob, B=Text, C=Numeric, D=Integer, E=Real)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
